issue_title: Clicking on current document gives you two copies side by side
issue_body_preview:
I found this confusing but wasn't sure if this was intended because I don't use Notion very much. @epatters assured me that it's not how it works there either so it's likely a bug. Here is a recording: 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1dacc63e-e9d7-4385-9965-38ee3de5e1d6
test_description_zh: 在文档页面中，点击侧边栏或导航中当前已打开的文档链接，观察页面内容区域的显示情况。
expected_result_zh: 点击当前已打开的文档链接后，页面不应出现同一文档的两个并排副本，应保持只显示一份文档内容，或者不进行任何跳转/重复加载。
